researchResults.title: Startup Gimlet Labs is solving the AI inference bottleneck in a surprisingly elegant way
researchResults.description: Gimlet Labs just raised an $80 million Series A for tech that lets AI run across NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ARM, Cerebras and d-Matrix chips, simultaneously.

researchResults.title: Vibe-coding startup Lovable is on the hunt for acquisitions
researchResults.description: Lovable's founder said the fast-growing vibe-coding startup is looking for startups and teams to join its company.

researchResults.title: Air Street becomes one of the largest solo VCs in Europe with $232M fund
researchResults.description: London’s Air Street Capital has raised a large Fund III with eyes locked on backing early-stage European and North American AI companies.

researchResults.title: Bernie Sanders’ AI ‘gotcha’ video flops, but the memes are great
researchResults.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders thinks he's tricked Claude into revealing the AI industry's secrets, but he really just exposed how agreeable chatbots can become.

researchResults.title: Apple sets June date for WWDC 2026, teasing ‘AI advancements’
researchResults.description: Apple will host its next Worldwide Developers Conference the week of June 8. The company is expected to announce major updates to Siri with advanced AI capabilities.

researchResults.title: NVIDIA's CEO Projects $1 Trillion in AI Chip Sales as New Computing Era Begins
Our latest investment in open source security for the AI era
researchResults.description: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.
